parsed_review.summary: CP00-715 is a descriptor-only, runtime-closed RP23 finance-integrations closeout pack (risk C, 150 units, RP23.P07.M06.S03-RP23.P08.M02.S14). Read-only inspection confirms the pack-level readiness claim is supported and not prematurely asserted: manifest, construction-inspection, command-evidence, and adjudication all record production_ready=false/runtime_ready=false pending exactly one valid hardened Claude review. Baseline values (pack_id, risk_class, unit_count, range, deliverable_distribution, micro_title_distribution) match exactly across the prompt, registry binding/requirements (registry.js:358,3006), plan (closeout-pack-plan.json:36), next-pack-queue (live_latest_pack_id CP00-715), README, and the regenerated contract projection (external-integrations-ii-contract.json current_pack/latest_pack/latest_projection + validation.packs.cp715 coverage valid, errors []). Implementation is sound: the CP715 case-set/descriptor chains from CP714 (service.js:158-159), every row is descriptor_only with raw/financial/credential payloads and all bank/card/WEHAGO/Douzone/tax/DART runtime flags false, and validators.js enforces coverage, no-leak guards, authority boundary, Hermes/Claude gates, and handoff. Tests (model.test.js:58-60) and the contract validator (validate-rp23-external-integrations-ii-contract.mjs:32-43) assert coverage/descriptor errors empty, claude_is_final_approval=false, human runtime approval required, read_only=true, emits_runtime_receipt=false, and handoff to CP00-716/RP23.P08.M02.S15. Authority boundaries hold: Claude is a read-only independent reviewer (not final approver), Hermes patterns are used only for descriptor-only review packet/receipt handling (receipt_shape descriptor_only_finance_integrations_no_write), and no product runtime is embedded. No-real-data/no-write attestation is present throughout. Review-hardening preconditions pass: auth preflight succeeded (exit 0, 1444-byte valid JSON), no 0-byte/malformed/fenced/tool-call-shaped evidence, and no prior invalid review attempts. command-evidence.json reports all validation commands (node --check/--test, npm test, validate, spec:requirements, weighted, fullplan, goal:closeout, rp00:control-plane, git diff --check, build) at exit 0; this is agent-reported and not re-executed here because Bash is disallowed for this read-only review, but it is internally consistent with the directly-inspected source. The pack does not claim runtime opening or enterprise trust, so this receipt blocks neither pack closeout nor the CP closeout goal; human final approval for enterprise-trust/runtime opening remains required and is outside this receipt. Verdict: PASS with no findings.
